keyword.title: Search Query (Quoi, qui ?)
keyword.description: The specific business category or name (e.g., 'agence immobilière', 'restaurant', 'plombier').

location.title: Location (Où ?)
location.description: City, department, or region in France (e.g., 'Paris', 'Lyon', 'Marseille').

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of French business leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify Residential Proxy (France targeted) is highly required.
